{{CargoRelic
|name=Chenxiang Wood
|class_id=20500
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=This item was left behind by Liu Yanchang, Chenxiang's father, who died soon after Saint Mother gave birth to Chenxiang. Although this item was not a powerful treasure, it gave Chenxiang his name and was also a keepsake of his father.
|fame=30
|art=17
|fth=13
|civ=17
|tech=13
|ss1=Lumber Camp produces Ancient Wood by +1%<br>Per 5 Lumber Camp LVLs, Snail HP +20<br>Lumber Camp LVL: 50/50
|ss2=Lumber Camp produces Ancient Wood by +2%<br>Per 5 Lumber Camp LVLs, Snail HP +40<br>Lumber Camp LVL: 50/50
|ss3=Lumber Camp produces Ancient Wood by +3%<br>Per 5 Lumber Camp LVLs, Snail HP +60<br>Lumber Camp LVL: 50/50
|ss4=Lumber Camp produces Ancient Wood by +3%<br>Per 5 Lumber Camp LVLs, Snail HP +60<br>Lumber Camp LVL: 50/50
|ss7=Lumber Camp produces Ancient Wood by +3%<br>Per 5 Lumber Camp LVLs, Snail HP +60<br>Lumber Camp LVL: 50/50<br> (Awakened)
}}
